productName: Green Reaper - Live Resin Disposable - Strawberry Cough - 1g
description: This sativa disposable carries Strawberry Cough in a ready-to-go pen with the battery built right in — grab it, hit it, recycle it when it's done. Grab-and-go convenience, with notes of strawberry, sweet, and berry, delivering an upbeat, talkative energy.
